message:
fuzz: assert merge_issue outputs pass IssueValidator::validate (beads_rust-gxhx)

- Add IssueValidator::validate() assertion on every Keep/KeepWithNote
  result from both merge_issue and three_way_merge
- Fix normalize_issue to produce validator-passing issues:
  - valid_issue_id: force lowercase, ensure prefix-hash format
  - sanitize_external_ref: strip whitespace, enforce length limit
  - normalize_status_fields: clear closed_at for non-terminal statuses
- Verified with cargo +nightly fuzz run merge_issue -- -runs=2000

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
